bids.reasoning: At the opening with no opponent offers or messages, I target my maximum-utility bid and avoid conceding before seeing their priorities. Since time pressure is zero, there is no need to trade away value yet, especially on the high-weight issues C and D.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid while making only a small concession to avoid repeating my opening offer. The opponent’s only offer is all valueA, which is extremely poor for me and shows no concession pattern yet, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues C and D and concede only on low-weight issueA.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early at t=0.04 and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeating the all-valueA offer. I will make only a small concession on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the high-importance issues C and D and on issueB.

I am still targeting a high-utility bid because it is very early in the negotiation (t=0.06) and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeatedly offering all valueA. I will make a small concession only on my lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the more important issues B, C, and D.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.828 for myself, conceding only on the lowest-weight issue while preserving my strongest preferences on issues B, C, and D. Since it is still very early at t=0.08 and the opponent has shown no concession at all, I should not move much toward their all-valueA demand yet, but I will avoid repeating my previous exact offer.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.82 by conceding only on the lowest-weight issueA while holding firm on the more important issues B, C, and D. It is still very early at t=0.10, and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering all valueA, so there is no reason to make a large concession yet.

I am targeting a high-utility bid because it is still very early at t=0.12 and the opponent has shown no concession, repeatedly offering all valueA. I have already fully conceded issueA, so I will avoid repeating my last bid by making a small, low-cost concession on issueD from valueF to valueE while keeping strong positions on issueB and issueC.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.80 for me, since it is still very early at t=0.14 and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has repeatedly offered the same all-valueA bid with no concession, so I am making only a small tradeoff by moving issueC from valueF to valueC while holding stronger positions on issueB and issueD.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 by keeping the most important issues, issueC and issueD, at valueF while conceding further on lower-weight issueB and already having conceded issueA. The opponent has repeatedly offered only the all-valueA bid with no concession, and since time is still early at t=0.16, I should not move close to that outcome yet, but I can vary my concession to test flexibility.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.75 because we are early in the negotiation at t=0.18, so there is no need to move close to the opponent’s all-valueA position yet. The opponent has repeated the same very low-utility offer for me and has not conceded, so I am varying my concession slightly without giving up too much on the high-importance issues C and D.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.75 because it is early in the negotiation at t=0.20 and the opponent has shown no concession, repeatedly offering the same all-valueA bid. I will keep firm on high-importance issueC while conceding more on lower/medium leverage issues and making a different offer from my previous bid.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.71 while making a further concession from my last offer, since it is still relatively early at t=0.22. The opponent has held completely firm on all valueA offers and sent no messages, so I am conceding cautiously on lower-weight issueB while protecting high-weight issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a strong weighted utility of about 0.705, since t=0.24 is still early and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the same all-valueA bid. I have already conceded fully on low-importance issueA and slightly on issueD, so I will make only a small additional movement on issueB while holding the high-importance issueC and mostly preserving issueD.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.65 by conceding further on lower-weight issueB while preserving high utility on the most important issues, especially issueC and issueD. At t=0.26 there is still time, but the opponent has held completely firm at all valueA offers, so I am making a noticeable concession without dropping to their very low-utility bid. No opponent messages were provided, and the offer history shows no concession from them so far.

I am targeting a weighted utility around 0.624, which is a meaningful concession but still preserves value on the high-importance issues. Since it is still relatively early at t=0.28 and the opponent has not conceded at all from all-valueA offers, I should not collapse to their position; instead I make a low-cost concession on issueC from valueF to valueC while holding issueD at valueE.

I targeted a moderate utility bid around 0.58, keeping value on the high-importance issueC while conceding further on issueD and already giving the opponent valueA on lower/medium issues A and B. At t=0.30 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept their repeated all-valueA stance; their offers show no concession and no messages provide additional credible signal.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.58, since we are only about one-third through the negotiation and the opponent has not conceded at all from their repeated all-valueA position. I have already conceded on lower-weight issues A and B, so this offer varies the prior bid while preserving reasonable value on the higher-weight issues C and D.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.58, since time is only at 0.34 and there is still no need to collapse to the opponent’s all-valueA demand. The opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the same all-valueA bid, so I will continue conceding mainly on low-weight issueA and issueB while preserving value on the high-weight issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.55 rather than accepting the opponent’s all-valueA bid, since we are only at t=0.36 and their repeated offers show no actual concession. I have already conceded fully on issueA and issueB, so this bid makes a further concession on issueC while preserving a strong value on high-weight issueD.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.54: I have already conceded fully on the lower/medium priority issues A and B, while preserving some value on the high-weight issues C and D. The opponent has held completely firm at all valueA offers, so there is no evidence of reciprocal concession; at t=0.38 I should continue gradual concessions but not collapse to their bid yet.

I targeted a utility of about 0.53, making only a small additional concession because we are still in the mid-game at t=0.40. The opponent has repeatedly offered the same all-valueA bid with no concession or messages, so I am keeping strength on the high-weight issues C and D while already conceding fully on lower/previously conceded issues A and B.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.50 by keeping issueD at a reasonably good value while conceding heavily on issueA and issueB and further on issueC. At t=0.42 there is some time pressure but it is not yet the deadline, so I should not drop all the way to the opponent’s repeated all-valueA demand. The opponent has made no concessions and sent no messages, so I am moving gradually toward their apparent preference while preserving value on my high-importance issues.

I am targeting a moderate utility bid (about 0.477 weighted utility) because we are nearing the middle of the negotiation but not yet at the deadline. The opponent has repeated the all-valueA offer without conceding, so I am conceding on issueA and issueB and making a further movement on issueD, while still preserving some value on high-importance issueC.

I targeted a moderate mid-game utility around 0.44, keeping some value on the high-weight issueC and issueD while already fully conceding the lower-priority issueA and issueB. The opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering all valueA with no messages, so I am making a further but controlled concession without dropping to their full demand yet.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.42, since we are near the midpoint and should make a real concession without collapsing to the opponent’s repeated all-valueA demand. The opponent has held completely firm with the same lowest-utility offer for me every round and has sent no messages, so I am relying on time-based concession rather than any demonstrated reciprocal movement.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.40 at the midpoint, conceding further because the opponent has held completely firm on all valueA offers. Since they have not shown any differentiated preferences, I am giving them valueA on three issues while preserving some value on issueC, one of my high-weight issues, and avoiding an exact repeat of my previous bid.

I am targeting a modest utility around 0.42: above the opponent's all-valueA offer to me, but with substantial concessions already made on issueA and issueB. The opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering all valueA, so at t=0.52 I will not collapse to their bid yet; instead I keep some value on the high-weight issues while avoiding repeating my immediately previous bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.405, which is a meaningful concession from my earlier offers while still preserving value on a key high-weight issue. At t=0.54 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s repeated all-valueA demand, especially since they have shown no concession at all and sent no messages. I concede fully on issueA, issueB, and issueC, while holding issueD at valueE because issueD is highly important to me and valueE is still near my top utility there.

I am targeting a moderate concession around 0.36 utility for me, preserving some value on high-weight issueC while giving the opponent valueA on the other three issues. The opponent has made no concessions at all and repeatedly offers all valueA, so at t=0.56 I should move closer to that pattern without dropping all the way to their 0.18-utility bid yet.

I am targeting a utility around 0.40: low enough to make a meaningful concession, but still clearly above the all-valueA offer's utility to me. At t=0.58 there is real time pressure but not enough to fully capitulate, and the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering all valueA with no messages or additional signals.

I am targeting a still-positive utility around 0.36 by conceding most issues to the opponent’s repeatedly signaled valueA while preserving some value on high-importance issueD. The opponent has held firm at all valueA with no messages or numerical concession, but at t=0.60 there is still time before the deadline, so I will not yet collapse fully to their exact bid.

I am targeting a modest utility above the all-valueA fallback while continuing to concede because we are past the midpoint at t=0.62. The opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering valueA on every issue, so I am moving closer to that pattern while preserving some value on the high-weight issueD. This avoids repeating my previous bid and tests whether a smaller remaining concession on issueD can be accepted.

I am targeting a modest utility around 0.273 by keeping only a small gain on issueD while conceding the other issues to the opponent’s repeated valueA pattern. At t=0.64 there is meaningful time pressure, and the opponent has shown no concession at all, so I am moving closer to their all-valueA position without dropping immediately to my minimum acceptable valid bid.

At t=0.66 the opponent has shown no concession at all, repeatedly offering the all-valueA bid, and there are no messages adding credible information. Since my prior concessions have not moved them and the deadline is approaching, I am targeting the lowest positive utility bid they have consistently signaled they would accept rather than risking no agreement.
